name: Chocolate Amaretto Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt Crisco shortening and chocolate in a saucepan over low heat, stirring until smoothly blended. Remove from heat and add sugar, vanilla, and eggs. Beat well.
2. Combine flour, baking powder, salt, and toasted sliced almonds. Add to chocolate mixture, stirring until well blended.
3. Spread the batter in a greased 9 x 9-inch springform pan.
4. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 20 to 25 minutes. Do not overbake. Cool completely.
Filling:
1. Beat cream cheese and icing sugar in a small bowl until light and fluffy. Gradually add liqueur, beating until smooth. Whip cream to soft peaks. Reserve some for garnish if desired.
2. Fold remaining cream into the cheese mixture.
3. Spread over cooled base. Chill 3 hours or overnight. Garnish with toasted almonds and/or reserved whipped cream.
Hint: Try other liqueurs in place of Amaretto liqueur. About 10 servings. Freezing: Excellent
